holdings.infoBox: RAFE is an equity ETF with a total of 290 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 5.21%, Microsoft at 3.60%, UnitedHealth Group at 3.35%, Johnson & Johnson at 3.26%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.42%.

overview.description: The PIMCO RAFI ESG U.S. ETF (RAFE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the RAFI ESG US index. The fund tracks an index of US companies that are selected and weighted by a combination of fundamental and ESG criteria. RAFE was launched on Dec 18, 2019 and is issued by PIMCO.
